sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78042" key="paraibate/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραι-βᾰτέω</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραι-βάτης</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραι-βάτις</orth>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παραβ-</foreign>.</entryFree>
